pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates it and export script reads it
verifier.py checks for these exact names and specific mathematical operators
verifier.py enforces this exact minimum file size for the exported TIF

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Landsat 7 TOA dataset data downloaded from opengeos GitHub to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The agent must export the processed image to /home/ga/snap_exports. The verifier rigorously checks the generated DIMAP file for three specifically named bands: spectral_mean, spectral_range, and nir_deviation, as well as checking the mathematical logic of the expressions. The final GeoTIFF export is expected to be at least 51,200 bytes.
